headline: Aineko Sentinel Raises $48M Series A for Agentic Escrow + Real Estate Contract Automation
description: Persistent multi-agent systems that automate title, escrow, and compliance workflows with continuous equilibrium and full audit trails.
founderQuote: We're turning the world's most paper-heavy regulated processes into living agent-native infrastructure.
investorQuote: This is the exact kind of high-leverage vertical agent stack we look for.

headline: Seraphix Raises $67M Series A for Sovereign Entity Orchestration Platform
description: AI entities that can form, fund, and operate across insurance, defense, and capital markets with shared persistent context.
founderQuote: The founding team can stay extremely small and still move at hyperspeed once the agent layer is this strong.
investorQuote: When agents become first-class economic actors, everything changes.

headline: Quantara Raises $285M Series A Co-Led by Khosla Ventures for Hybrid Quantum-Agentic Simulation
description: Fault-tolerant quantum-classical agents that deliver practical utility-scale speedups for complex modeling in finance, aerospace, and drug discovery.
founderQuote: Our neutral-atom arrays combined with persistent multi-agent orchestration deliver exponential speedups for regulated industries.
investorQuote: When agents can actually perform actions on top of fault-tolerant quantum substrates, the leverage becomes generational.

headline: AegisForge Raises $1.15B Series D at $7.8B Valuation for Autonomous Drone Swarms with Quantum Command
description: Guardian agents that fuse real-time ISR, counter-UAS, and hybrid quantum simulation for mission planning at the edge.
founderQuote: Physical autonomy layered with quantum decision layers is where defense leverage compounds fastest.
investorQuote: This is the dual-use agent velocity we look for across physical and digital domains.

headline: Claimara Raises $105M Series B for Agentic Insurance Decisioning and Real-Time Underwriting Fabric
description: Persistent agents that handle end-to-end risk scoring, policy orchestration, and regulatory compliance with zero human touchpoints.
founderQuote: We're turning regulated insurance processes into fully agent-native systems.
investorQuote: The teams shipping agent-native infrastructure in regulated verticals are pulling away from the pack.

headline: Devora Raises $95M Series B Led by Sequoia for AI-Native Developer Agent Platform
description: Teams move from business intent to production code with full audit trails using persistent shared context across multi-agent workflows.
founderQuote: This is the infrastructure shift enterprises have been waiting for in a post-copilot world.
investorQuote: The shift from copilots to agentic software factories in regulated environments is where the next wave of leverage sits.

headline: TerraQuant Raises $48M Series A for AI-Native Real Estate Financial OS with Quantum Risk Modeling
description: Satellite mapping, title automation, and agent-orchestrated capital flows now run inside one sovereign persistent context layer.

headline: VoxForge Raises $62M Series B for Voice-First Agentic Home Services and On-Demand Labor Orchestration

headline: Nexlify Raises $128M Series A as Founder Returns as Full-Time CEO to Scale Agentic Code Forge Platform
description: AI-enabled Software Forge that lets enterprise teams collaborate with persistent agents to design, refactor, and deploy complex systems end-to-end with full audit trails.
founderQuote: Our AI-enabled Software Forge lets enterprise teams collaborate with persistent agents to design, refactor, and deploy complex systems with full audit trails.
